cammy-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
cammy-stand-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cammy-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
cammy-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Can get frame advantage with meaty timing and leads to good conversions on counter-hit; decent Drive Rush starter (links to 5HP on hit, frame traps into itself) but doesn't carry much forward momentum; extended hurtbox remains for 4f after active frames

cammy-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
cammy-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Great disjointed hitbox; moves Cammy far forward during startup, giving it good range but making it easier to whiff punish; good Drive Rush starter (good momentum, links into 4MP~HK if close enough or frame traps into 5LP/2LP)

cammy-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
cammy-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Good range for 5f punishes and light conversions; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; special cancel is delayed until after active frames (prevents OD Spiral Arrow combo); DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cammy-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
cammy-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Great ranged poke, vulnerable to DI if predicted; extended hurtbox remains for 7f after active frames, making it somewhat more whiff punishable

cammy-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter
2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
cammy-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: 2f extra recovery on whiff; great ranged poke; Punish Counter knockdown does not lead to follow-up combo, but gives great corner carry; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles; crouch-sized hurtbox on frames 1-28; particularly vulnerable to Drive Impact in neutral; can anti-air some long range jump-ins; has high juggle potential (causes air reset when juggled into)

cammy-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
cammy-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

cammy-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
cammy-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: Good counterpoke and useful combo filler after 2HP or CH 5LP/2LP/5MP; 3f extra recovery on whiff; extends a wide hurtbox during recovery on whiff

cammy-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
cammy-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Forces stand; Good for starting pressure, especially with meaty timing (236HK + Dash 2HP sets gives enough advantage to link 5HP); extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; situationally useful anti-air

cammy-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled
cammy-crouch-light-kick.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; low hitconfirm starter; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active and remains 5f after active

cammy-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
cammy-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Great ranged cancelable low poke; very useful when canceled to DR; extended hurtbox appears for 1f before active and remains 6f after active; special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; Range: 1.49

cammy-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a Hard Knock Down when hitting an opponent on the ground
Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

cammy-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
cammy-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels into j.214K/j.214214P on forward jump only; low blockstun means there will always be a blockstring gap if canceled; lower body projectile invuln 6-28f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cammy-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
cammy-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; good hitbox disjoint near Cammy's fists; lower body projectile invuln 8-35f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cammy-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
cammy-jump-light-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead (except vs. Blanka)

cammy-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
cammy-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Long hitbox can work as a ranged air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 7-30f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cammy-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
cammy-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Good jump-in from long range, especially mixed with empty jump or j.214K to bait anti-airs; can air-to-air from long range; lower body projectile invuln 10-35f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

lift-uppercut.name: Lift Uppercut
notes: A quick uppercut. Useful against jumping opponents
lift-uppercut.notes_sc: Forces stand (required for 4MP~HK TC); useful anti-air starting on frame 6 but can often trade or whiff against close jumps; extended arm hurtbox on active frames 3-5 is anti-air invulnerable; combos naturally from 5LP/2LP/5MP at close range

delayed-ripper.name: Delayed Ripper
notes: A kick unleashed after stepping backward. Can be canceled into special moves
Increase juggle state time when attack lands as a Punish Counter
delayed-ripper.notes_sc: 5f extra recovery on whiff/block; pulls back hurtbox on frame 5-14 (auto-shimmy tool); low blockstun means that DR Cancel is the only way to make it safe; extended hurtbox remains for 9f after active frames; special cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; can juggle into DRC~5HP~HK on normal hit or 214LP on Punish Counter for strong juggle routes

assault-blade.name: Assault Blade
notes: A launching kick that can be canceled into special moves. It can be jumped out of on hit
Can only be canceled into a jump if the attack hits
assault-blade.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouching opponents; jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponents into limited juggle state on hit (free juggle if started from Drive Rush)

lift-combination.name: Lift Combination
lift-combination.name_ja: リフトコンビネーション
notes: A two-hit combination attack that can be canceled into special moves. If it connects, the second hit can be jumped out of
Can only be canceled into a jump if the attack hits
lift-combination.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouch blocking opponents (works on crouching hit because 4MP forces stand); jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; has 5f more recovery than 4HK on its own, resulting in more limited juggle follow-ups

swing-combination.name: Swing Combination
swing-combination.name_ja: スイングコンビネーション
notes: A series of attacks, the first and second of which can be canceled into special moves
Only the first hit can be canceled into a special move
swing-combination.notes_sc: 2 hits; leaves a 9f gap between 1st and 2nd hit on block; 1st hit of HK is cancelable into j.214K (9f gap) or SA2; 2nd hit acts as a cancelable grounded normal; 2nd hit is cancelable into Supers after 5 recovery frames and into specials/DI/DR after 7 recovery frames

spiral-arrow-light.name: Spiral Arrow (Light)
notes: A spinning kick with both legs that travels low along the ground. Useful for launching surprise attacks from a distance or used out of normal moves to create combos
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 24

spiral-arrow-medium.name: Spiral Arrow (Medium)
notes: A spinning kick with both legs that travels low along the ground. Useful for launching surprise attacks from a distance or used out of normal moves to create combos
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 26

spiral-arrow-heavy.name: Spiral Arrow (Heavy)
notes: A spinning kick with both legs that travels low along the ground. Useful for launching surprise attacks from a distance or used out of normal moves to create combos
Considered airborne from frames 18 - 33

spiral-arrow-charged.name: Spiral Arrow (Charged)
spiral-arrow-charged.name_ja: スパイラルアロー（ホールド）
notes: A spinning kick with both legs that travels low along the ground. Useful for launching surprise attacks from a distance or used out of normal moves to create combos
Hold the button for more than 16 frames to change its properties
Considered airborne from frames 30 - 45

spiral-arrow-od.name: Spiral Arrow (OD)
notes: A spinning kick with both legs that travels low along the ground. Useful for launching surprise attacks from a distance or used out of normal moves to create combos
Considered airborne from frames 16 - 32

cannon-spike-light.name: Cannon Spike (Light)
notes: From a low stance, kick upward while rising into the air. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 40
Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14

cannon-spike-medium.name: Cannon Spike (Medium)
notes: From a low stance, kick upward while rising into the air. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 42
Does 800 individual damage after the 3rd active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9

cannon-spike-heavy.name: Cannon Spike (Heavy)
notes: From a low stance, kick upward while rising into the air. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Hold down the button for over 23 frames to change its properties
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8
Considered airborne from frames 10 - 36
Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8

cannon-spike-charged.name: Cannon Spike (Charged)
cannon-spike-charged.name_ja: キャノンスパイク（ホールド）
notes: From a low stance, kick upward while rising into the air. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7
Completely invincible from frames 20 - 25
Considered airborne from frames 26 - 64
Does 900 individual damage after the 5th active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7

cannon-spike-od.name: Cannon Spike (OD)
notes: From a low stance, kick upward while rising into the air. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 7
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 47
Does 900 individual damage after the 5th active frame

quick-spin-knuckle-light.name: Quick Spin Knuckle (Light)
quick-spin-knuckle-light.name_ja: アクセルスピンナックル（弱）
notes: Take a spinning hop forward and strike with the back of your fist. Useful for continuing your offensive pressure or as a way to slip through an opponent's guard

quick-spin-knuckle-medium.name: Quick Spin Knuckle (Medium)
quick-spin-knuckle-medium.name_ja: アクセルスピンナックル（中）
notes: Take a spinning hop forward and strike with the back of your fist. Useful for continuing your offensive pressure or as a way to slip through an opponent's guard
Invincible to projectiles from frames 9 - 23

quick-spin-knuckle-heavy.name: Quick Spin Knuckle (Heavy)
quick-spin-knuckle-heavy.name_ja: アクセルスピンナックル（強）
notes: Take a spinning hop forward and strike with the back of your fist. Useful for continuing your offensive pressure or as a way to slip through an opponent's guard
Invincible to projectiles from frames 9 - 27

quick-spin-knuckle-od.name: Quick Spin Knuckle (OD)
quick-spin-knuckle-od.name_ja: アクセルスピンナックル（OD）
notes: Take a spinning hop forward and strike with the back of your fist. Useful for continuing your offensive pressure or as a way to slip through an opponent's guard
Invincible to projectiles from frames 3 - 24
When performed at close range, Cammy will go behind her opponent and attack. In this situation, start up is 3 frames later

cannon-strike.name: Cannon Strike
notes: A descending kick performed while airborne. Useful as a way to approach an opponent or as a means of continuing your offensive pressure
Recovery value difference is when the attack is performed at its fastest
cannon-strike.notes_sc: Forward jump only; cancelable from j.MP; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; hitconfirm reaction time is longer the higher the divekick connects (cancelable until landing); frame advantage on hit/block is fixed when connecting on the first active frame (e.g. as a corner throw escape); 2f extra hitstun and blockstun if it connects on the final 2 active frames before landing (screen shake occurs, guaranteeing an advantage of at least +10/+6)

cannon-strike-od.name: Cannon Strike (OD)
notes: A descending kick performed while airborne. Useful as a way to approach an opponent or as a means of continuing your offensive pressure
Recovery value difference is when the attack is performed at its fastest

hooligan-combination.name: Hooligan Combination
hooligan-combination.name_ja: フーリガンコンビネーション
notes: Perform a spinning jump through the air in a parabolic arc. While airborne, many other moves can be performed out of this one
From frame 21 until landing, can be canceled into any offshoot attacks except for Razor’s Edge Slicer on frame 7 or later. Is considered airborne
hooligan-combination.notes_sc: Startup refers to earliest/latest follow-up input timings; holding HP for 18-19f results in a full charge up to 2f faster than normal; can cross over crouching opponents; follow-ups gain properties of OD versions (except for SA2 cancelability)

razors-edge-slicer.name: Razor's Edge Slicer
razors-edge-slicer.name_ja: レイザーエッジスライサー
notes: A low kick performed after landing from Hooligan Combination. This move is performed if nothing is input during the Hooligan Combination
razors-edge-slicer.notes_sc: Puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; low profile 70-98f; can be up to 2f faster if HP is held for only 18f; crouching state during recovery

hooligan-cannon-strike.name: Hooligan Cannon Strike
hooligan-cannon-strike.name_ja: フーリガンキャノンストライク
notes: During hooligan combination
A descending kick performed from Hooligan Combination. If you cross over your opponent before activating this move, the kick will automatically turn around so it heads toward your opponent
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked
hooligan-cannon-strike.notes_sc: Startup refers to earliest timing from Hooligan; button strength does not affect divekick trajectory; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; autocorrects toward opponent after crossing over; can be up to 2f faster if HP is held for only 18f

reverse-edge.name: Reverse Edge
notes: During hooligan combination
A downward kick performed from Hooligan Combination. It is an overhead attack that cannot be blocked crouching, making it useful for breaking through an opponent's guard
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked
reverse-edge.notes_sc: 2 hits; causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents that can juggle into 623MK/HK/KK or SA1/SA3 Super (low height juggle connect will not allow time for follow-up); does not autocorrect toward opponent after crossing over; crouching state during landing recovery; can be up to 2f faster if HP is held for only 18f

fatal-leg-twister.name: Fatal Leg Twister
fatal-leg-twister.name_ja: フェイタルレッグツイスター
notes: During hooligan combination
When close to a standing opponent
A throw performed from Hooligan Combination. It can grab opponents who are standing while on the ground and does massive damage
fatal-leg-twister.notes_sc: Throws standing opponents only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; 15% damage increase on Punish Counter; up to 2f more total recovery before landing (depends on activation height); crouching state during landing recovery; can be up to 2f faster if HP is held for only 18f; extends a proximity guard box that immediately forces a crouch blocking opponent's hurtbox to reach its crouching height, preventing uncrouchable meaty setups (but can still throw opponents that hold straight down on wakeup)

silent-step.name: Silent Step
notes: During hooligan combination
A quick descent performed from Hooligan Combination. This fast maneuver is useful as a feint after making an opponent think you're about to attack
silent-step.notes_sc: Stops forward trajectory; recovery before landing depends on activation height; Cammy is in crouching state during recovery; useful for baiting reversals in setups where throw/overhead/divekick could hit meaty; can be up to 2f faster if HP is held for only 18f

hooligan-combination-charged.name: Hooligan Combination (Charged)
hooligan-combination-charged.name_ja: フーリガンコンビネーション（ホールド）
notes: Perform a spinning jump through the air in a parabolic arc. While airborne, many other moves can be performed out of this one
Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change its properties
From frame 41 until landing, can be canceled into any offshoot attacks except for Razor’s Edge Slicer on frame 27 or later. Is considered airborne

razors-edge-slicer-charged.name: Razor's Edge Slicer (Charged)
razors-edge-slicer-charged.name_ja: レイザーエッジスライサー（ホールド）
notes: A low kick performed after landing from Hooligan Combination. This move is performed if nothing is input during the Hooligan Combination
Only the final attack can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

hooligan-cannon-strike-charged.name: Hooligan Cannon Strike (Charged)
hooligan-cannon-strike-charged.name_ja: フーリガンキャノンストライク（ホールド）
notes: A descending kick performed from Hooligan Combination. If you cross over your opponent before activating this move, the kick will automatically turn around so it heads toward your opponent
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked

reverse-edge-charged.name: Reverse Edge (Charged)
reverse-edge-charged.name_ja: リバースエッジ（ホールド）
notes: A downward kick performed from Hooligan Combination. It is an overhead attack that cannot be blocked crouching, making it useful for breaking through an opponent's guard

fatal-leg-twister-charged.name: Fatal Leg Twister (Charged)
fatal-leg-twister-charged.name_ja: フェイタルレッグツイスター（ホールド）
notes: A throw performed from Hooligan Combination. It can grab opponents who are standing while on the ground and does massive damage

silent-step-charged.name: Silent Step (Charged)
silent-step-charged.name_ja: サイレントステップ（ホールド）
notes: A quick descent performed from Hooligan Combination. This fast maneuver is useful as a feint after making an opponent think you're about to attack

hooligan-combination-od.name: Hooligan Combination (OD)
hooligan-combination-od.name_ja: フーリガンコンビネーション（OD）
notes: Perform a spinning jump through the air in a parabolic arc. While airborne, many other moves can be performed out of this one
From frame 21 until landing, can be canceled into any offshoot attacks except for Overdrive Razor’s Edge Slicer on frame 7 or later. Is considered airborne

razors-edge-slicer-od.name: Razor's Edge Slicer (OD)
razors-edge-slicer-od.name_ja: レイザーエッジスライサー（OD）
notes: A low kick performed after landing from Hooligan Combination. This move is performed if nothing is input during the Hooligan Combination
Only the final attack can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

hooligan-cannon-strike-od.name: Hooligan Cannon Strike (OD)
hooligan-cannon-strike-od.name_ja: フーリガンキャノンストライク（OD）
notes: A descending kick performed from Hooligan Combination. If you cross over your opponent before activating this move, the kick will automatically turn around so it heads toward your opponent
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked

reverse-edge-od.name: Reverse Edge (OD)
notes: A downward kick performed from Hooligan Combination. It is an overhead attack that cannot be blocked crouching, making it useful for breaking through an opponent's guard

fatal-leg-twister-od.name: Fatal Leg Twister (OD)
fatal-leg-twister-od.name_ja: フェイタルレッグツイスター（OD）
notes: A throw performed from Hooligan Combination. It can grab opponents who are standing while on the ground and does massive damage

silent-step-od.name: Silent Step (OD)
notes: A quick descent performed from Hooligan Combination. This fast maneuver is useful as a feint after making an opponent think you're about to attack

spin-drive-smasher.name: Spin Drive Smasher
spin-drive-smasher.name_ja: スピンドライブスマッシャー
notes: A forward-moving combination attack consisting of a Spiral Arrow followed by a Cannon Spike. It has invincibility on startup, making it useful for turning the tables
Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 1 to frame 11.
The 6th attack is only performed if the 5th attack hits

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 1 to frame 11.

spin-drive-smasher.notes_sc: Great combo tool with high juggle potential and corner carry; 5th hits transitions into launching follow-up on hit only; damage distribution: 100,200x3,100,200,1000

killer-bee-spin.name: Killer Bee Spin
notes: Jump into the air, seize your opponent with a quick descending kick, and perform a chokehold on them. This move executes quickly, making it easy to combo into from grounded moves
Attack does not transition into the cinematic attack when hitting an airborne opponent
Damage is 220 x n (multiple hits until Cammy lands on the ground)
killer-bee-spin.notes_sc: Can escape grounded meaty attacks, but usually results in Cammy whiffing over opponent's head; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (no cinematic), number of airborne hits varies based on juggle height; Drive Damage distribution: 900x3-x7,3000; only deals 250 damage on the first hit if it trades

aerial-killer-bee-spin.name: Aerial Killer Bee Spin
aerial-killer-bee-spin.name_ja: エアキラービースピン
notes: During a forward jump
Performed while airborne, seize your opponent with a quick descending kick and perform a chokehold on them. Easy to combo into from aerial specials
Attack does not transition into the cinematic attack when hitting an airborne opponent
Damage is 220 x n (multiple hits until Cammy lands on the ground)
aerial-killer-bee-spin.notes_sc: Forward jump only; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (no cinematic), number of airborne hits varies based on juggle height; non-cinematic Drive Damage distribution: 900x3-x7,3700; only deals 250 damage on the first hit if it trades

delta-red-assault.name: Delta Red Assault
delta-red-assault.name_ja: デルタレッドアサルト
notes: When under 25% vitality
Send your opponent to their knees with a series of high-speed attacks and finish with a powerful kick. A highly versatile move, useful both in combos and as a way of dealing with projectiles
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
Considered airborn from frames 9 - 27
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves
delta-red-assault.notes_sc: Full screen anti-projectile move (can lose to slow projectiles at max range); combos from charged 623[HP], 214P, or 236HK 1st hit when canceled into; cinematic time regenerates ~1.9 Drive bars for Cammy; only deals 500 damage on the first hit if it trades (only the first 5 active frames are invincible)

delta-red-assault-ca.name: Delta Red Assault (Critical Art)
delta-red-assault-ca.name_ja: デルタレッドアサルト (CA)
notes: Send your opponent to their knees with a series of high-speed attacks and finish with a powerful kick. A highly versatile move, useful both in combos and as a way of dealing with projectiles
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
Considered airborn from frames 9 - 27
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
*Can only be canceled into from special moves

rough-landing.name: Rough Landing
notes: When near opponent
Latch onto your opponent and whirl around them before smashing their face into the ground. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
rough-landing.notes_sc: Can walk for a manually-timed corner throw loop; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

delta-throw.name: Delta Throw
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent's head between your legs and perform a spin that tosses them behind you, switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
delta-throw.notes_sc: No throw oki after corner side switch; can use Drive Rush 5MP (+3 oB, links to 5HP on hit), or Drive Rush 2MP to set up trade combo vs. reversal 4f normals; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

leg-scissors-choke.name: Leg Scissors Choke
leg-scissors-choke.name_ja: レッグシザースチョーク
notes: During a jump
When near opponent
Grab an airborne opponent between your legs and drive their head into the ground. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
leg-scissors-choke.notes_sc: Can get throw oki if opponent is near the corner (no oki midscreen even with Drive Rush)
